$token..validate: newData.hasChildren(['role', 'canWrite', 'createdAt']) && (newData.child('role').val() == 'reader' || newData.child('role').val() == 'editor') && newData.child('canWrite').isBoolean() && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && ((newData.child('role').val() == 'reader' && newData.child('canWrite').val() == false) || (newData.child('role').val() == 'editor' && newData.child('canWrite').val() == true))

$uid..write: auth != null && auth.uid == $uid && ((root.child('lists').child($listId).child('meta').child('ownerUid').val() == auth.uid && newData.child('role').val() == 'owner' && newData.child('canWrite').val() == true) || (root.child('tokens').child($listId).child(newData.child('token').val()).child('role').val() == newData.child('role').val() && root.child('tokens').child($listId).child(newData.child('token').val()).child('canWrite').val() == newData.child('canWrite').val()))
